error.signature: mapper_parsing_exception: failed to parse field [timestamp] of type [date]

verdict.summary: Document field type does not match index mapping. Sending string where number expected, or wrong date format.

dead_ends.action: Delete and recreate the index with dynamic mapping
dead_ends.why_fails: Dynamic mapping guesses types from first document; subsequent documents with different types will fail the same way

dead_ends.action: Set strict_date_optional_time for all date fields
dead_ends.why_fails: Only works if all dates use ISO 8601. If you have epoch timestamps or custom formats, this fails.

workarounds.action: Define explicit mapping with correct field types before indexing
Fix the source data to match the existing mapping
Use ingest pipeline to transform data before indexing
workarounds.how: Use date processor in ingest pipeline to normalize date formats
